title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Voltas - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Voltas - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Voltas are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Voltas:
Voltas is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Voltas!
